sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14821" key="a)rgura/nqrwpos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀργῠρ-άνθρωπος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, '<sense id="n14821.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">silver-man,</tr_>' symbol in alchemy, Zos.Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1475.tlg001:p.112B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.112B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
